problem_text_cn: 轰炸机以速度v₁水平匀速飞行，飞行高度为H。1. 为使炸弹命中地面目标，应在离目标多大水平距离处投弹？2. 地面上与目标距离为D处有高射炮，与投弹同时发射炮弹，为使炮弹击中炸弹，炮弹初速v₂至少多大？3. 若v₂取最小值，炮弹发射角是多少？（忽略空气阻力，三者在同一竖直平面）
problem_text_en: A bomber flies horizontally at a uniform speed v₁ at a height H. 1. To hit a ground target with a bomb, at what horizontal distance from the target should the bomb be dropped？2. There is an anti-aircraft gun at a distance D from the target on the ground. The shell is fired at the same time as the bomb is dropped. What is the minimum initial speed v₂ of the shell to hit the bomb？3. If v₂ takes the minimum value，what is the firing angle of the shell？（Neglect air resistance，all three are in the same vertical plane）
problem_solution_cn: （1）投弹水平距离：- 炸弹平抛运动，落地时间t=√(2H/g)，水平距离L=v₁t=v₁√(2H/g)。（2）炮弹最小初速：- 炸弹运动方程x₁=v₁t，y₁=H - ½gt²；炮弹运动方程x₂=L-D + v₂cosα·t，y₂=v₂sinα·t - ½gt²；- 击中条件x₁=x₂、y₁=y₂，化简得M sinα=K - cosα（M=(L-D)/H，K=v₁/v₂）；- 方程有解要求1+M²≥K²，故v₂≥v₁/√(1+M²)=v₁H/√(H²+(L-D)²)。（3）最小速度对应发射角：- K=√(1+M²)，cosα=K/(1+M²)=1/√(1+M²)，α=arccos[H/√(H²+(L-D)²)]。
problem_solution_en: （1）Horizontal distance for bomb drop：- The bomb undergoes projectile motion，time to land t=√(2H/g)，horizontal distance L=v₁t=v₁√(2H/g)。（2）Minimum initial speed of shell：- Bomb motion equations x₁=v₁t，y₁=H - ½gt²；shell motion equations x₂=L-D + v₂cosα·t，y₂=v₂sinα·t - ½gt²；- Hitting condition x₁=x₂、y₁=y₂，simplifying to M sinα=K - cosα（M=(L-D)/H，K=v₁/v₂）；- The equation has a solution if 1+M²≥K²，so v₂≥v₁/√(1+M²)=v₁H/√(H²+(L-D)²)。（3）Firing angle for minimum speed：- K=√(1+M²)，cosα=K/(1+M²)=1/√(1+M²)，α=arccos[H/√(H²+(L-D)²)]。
